user.title: WeeWX Seasons weather station
user.description: Enter the URL of a WeeWX website that uses the Seasons skin (for example https://pany.gr/).

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the station, or no current weather data was found on the page.
error.invalid_timezone: Unknown time zone. Use an IANA name such as Europe/Zurich.

abort.already_configured: This station URL is already configured.
